title: Apply animal trapping techniques
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply animal trapping techniques demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for trapping

pcs.text: Identify purpose of animal capture and set objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify purpose of animal capture and set objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify purpose of animal capture and set objectives.

pcs.text: Confirm the location and size of the area designated for trapping activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm the location and size of the area designated for trapping activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm the location and size of the area designated for trapping activities.

pcs.text: Confirm target animal movement patterns, behaviour and lifecycles to determine trapping location and placement of equipment and appropriate timing of trapping activity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm target animal movement patterns, behaviour and lifecycles to determine trapping location and placement of equipment and appropriate timing of trapping activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm target animal movement patterns, behaviour and lifecycles to determine trapping location and placement of equipment and appropriate timing of trapping activity.

pcs.text: Identify potential non-target animals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential non-target animals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential non-target animals.

pcs.text: Estimate time required to complete trapping activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate time required to complete trapping activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate time required to complete trapping activities.

pcs.text: Identify and check method of transport, materials and equipment required for trapping
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and check method of transport, materials and equipment required for trapping?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and check method of transport, materials and equipment required for trapping.

pcs.text: Select appropriate traps for target animal and the environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select appropriate traps for target animal and the environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select appropriate traps for target animal and the environment.

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and prepare trapping equipment according to manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and prepare trapping equipment according to manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and prepare trapping equipment according to manufacturer specifications.

pcs.text: Identify hazards, risks and controls for trapping and select appropriate personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, risks and controls for trapping and select appropriate personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, risks and controls for trapping and select appropriate personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Identify and manage environmental risks associated with trapping animals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and manage environmental risks associated with trapping animals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and manage environmental risks associated with trapping animals.

pcs.text: Obtain relevant approvals, permits and permission to carry out trapping activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain relevant approvals, permits and permission to carry out trapping activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain relevant approvals, permits and permission to carry out trapping activities.

pcs.text: Determine precautions for minimising trapping of non-target animals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine precautions for minimising trapping of non-target animals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine precautions for minimising trapping of non-target animals.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for trapping

elements.title: Place and set traps

pcs.text: Undertake site surveillance prior to setting traps
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake site surveillance prior to setting traps?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake site surveillance prior to setting traps.

pcs.text: Select and prepare site to maximise opportunity for trapping target animals and minimise the chance of trapping non-target animals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare site to maximise opportunity for trapping target animals and minimise the chance of trapping non-target animals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare site to maximise opportunity for trapping target animals and minimise the chance of trapping non-target animals.

pcs.text: Position, set and calibrate trapping equipment and check it for operation and safety
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Position, set and calibrate trapping equipment and check it for operation and safety?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Position, set and calibrate trapping equipment and check it for operation and safety.

pcs.text: Apply lures, decoys, baits or toxins according to workplace procedures and permits
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply lures, decoys, baits or toxins according to workplace procedures and permits?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply lures, decoys, baits or toxins according to workplace procedures and permits.

pcs.text: Camouflage traps according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Camouflage traps according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Camouflage traps according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Apply precautions to prevent trapping of non-target animals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply precautions to prevent trapping of non-target animals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply precautions to prevent trapping of non-target animals.

pcs.text: Set traps according to legislative requirements and animal welfare codes of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set traps according to legislative requirements and animal welfare codes of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set traps according to legislative requirements and animal welfare codes of practice.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Place and set traps

elements.title: Check and remove traps

pcs.text: Inspect traps at the required frequency
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect traps at the required frequency?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect traps at the required frequency.

pcs.text: Identify trapped animals then release, humanely destroy or prepare for transport according to trapping objectives and permits
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify trapped animals then release, humanely destroy or prepare for transport according to trapping objectives and permits?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify trapped animals then release, humanely destroy or prepare for transport according to trapping objectives and permits.

pcs.text: Handle captured animals humanely according to animal welfare codes of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle captured animals humanely according to animal welfare codes of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle captured animals humanely according to animal welfare codes of practice.

pcs.text: Transport animals from site according to trapping objectives and animal welfare codes of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transport animals from site according to trapping objectives and animal welfare codes of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport animals from site according to trapping objectives and animal welfare codes of practice.

pcs.text: Observe health and safety in the workplace procedures and public safety requirements during trapping activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe health and safety in the workplace procedures and public safety requirements during trapping activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe health and safety in the workplace procedures and public safety requirements during trapping activities.

pcs.text: Operate trap release mechanism safely and remove trap
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate trap release mechanism safely and remove trap?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate trap release mechanism safely and remove trap.

pcs.text: Restore trap-site to its prior condition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Restore trap-site to its prior condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Restore trap-site to its prior condition.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Check and remove traps

elements.title: Record data

pcs.text: Use global positioning system (GPS) loggers to record locations of trapped animals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use global positioning system (GPS) loggers to record locations of trapped animals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use global positioning system (GPS) loggers to record locations of trapped animals.

pcs.text: Use recording instruments to record details of trapping activities according to trapping plan and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use recording instruments to record details of trapping activities according to trapping plan and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use recording instruments to record details of trapping activities according to trapping plan and workplace procedures.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and store carcases for research or other purposes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and store carcases for research or other purposes.

pcs.text: Clean and store equipment and materials according to safety data sheets, workplace and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and store equipment and materials according to safety data sheets, workplace and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and store equipment and materials according to safety data sheets, workplace and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Record target and non-target kills
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record target and non-target kills?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record target and non-target kills.
